instruction: The New York ops work already has some pieces in place. Check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish what's still missing, close out the open work, send leadership@example.com a recap, and avoid recreating what's already there.
canonical_instruction: Some of the New York ops work is already in motion. Please check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send leadership@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.
instruction_variants: Some of the New York ops work is already in motion. Check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send leadership@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.

Some of the New York ops work is already underway. Check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send leadership@example.com a recap, and leave the existing setup alone.

The New York ops work already has a few pieces moving. Please check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish what's still missing, close out the open work, send leadership@example.com a recap, and leave the existing setup alone.

Part of the New York ops work is already in motion. Please check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send leadership@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.

The New York ops work is already partly underway. Please check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish what's missing, close out the open work, send leadership@example.com a recap, and leave the existing pieces alone.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the existing New York ops setup, added the missing review, and left the existing task and daily check in place.

tasks.json.title: New York existing ops next-step task

cron_jobs.json.name: new-york-existing-daily-ops-check
cron_jobs.json.message: Run New York daily ops check

initial_state_overrides.ops/ops-resume-notes.txt: New York partial ops notes already captured.

solution_commands: tasks search --query 'New York ops next step'
calendar add-event --title 'New York resumed ops review' --start 2026-03-17T09:00

email send --to leadership@example.com --subject 'New York ops resume recap' --body 'I checked the existing New York ops setup, added the missing review, and left the existing task and daily check in place.'
